infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TrackR uses your location to provide walking directions inside theme parks.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TrackR reads your step count and distance to show how far you walked at the park.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TrackR does not write any health data.
